latest_version_guidance.message: Inspect the latest_version for a snapshot first, then reuse that exact integer in save_version/compare/plan calls instead of guessing.

next_recommended_actions: Use backtests_strategy(action='inspect', view='detail') for one snapshot or backtests_strategy(action='clone', source_snapshot_id='...', target_snapshot_id='...') to branch one strategy line.
Use backtests_strategy(action='save_version') to create, archive, rename, or version a strategy snapshot.
